content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup (Intermediate Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to monetize AI skills. Master Claude Code and Antigravity to ship faster, impress clients, and scale your freelance dev business today.
content.answer_block: Monetization fails when your delivery speed doesn't match client expectations. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your workflow into a high-velocity engine. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces architectural standards, and allows you to deliver production-ready code in hours, not weeks, turning your technical skills into high-ticket revenue.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a graveyard of half-finished projects and low-paying gigs, wondering why your technical prowess isn't reflecting in your bank account. The market doesn't pay for 'code'; it pays for speed and reliability. When you are stuck manually architecting every endpoint, you aren't a developer—you're a bottleneck.

But there is a way to break the cycle. By leveraging Claude Code as your autonomous architect and Antigravity as your structural foundation, you shift from a coder to a product delivery machine. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about building a repeatable, high-margin freelance business that clients can't stop hiring.

steps.title: Initialize the Architectural Foundation
steps.description: Establish the project scaffolding using Antigravity to ensure consistent, enterprise-grade directory structures before Claude touches a line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a clean, production-ready SaaS boilerplate architecture using Next.js 15, Tailwind, and Drizzle ORM. Enforce modular design patterns.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Context
steps.description: Define the project's 'Golden Rules' so Claude understands your client's specific tech stack and coding style, preventing hallucinations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a .claude-context file that mandates strict TypeScript typing, functional component patterns, and atomic design for UI components.

steps.title: Automate Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to translate high-level feature requests into tested, bug-free implementations within your established architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior lead dev. Implement a secure JWT authentication flow using the existing Drizzle schema. Ensure error handling is robust.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement JWT auth with middleware protection'

steps.title: Enforce Test-Driven Development (TDD)
steps.description: Force the AI to write tests before implementation, ensuring your client's product is bulletproof and maintainable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for all new API routes using Vitest. Ensure 90% coverage for the auth module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate and run vitest specs for the auth module'

steps.title: Final Audit and Refactor
steps.description: Perform a final pass to optimize performance and remove technical debt before the client demo.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the entire codebase for performance bottlenecks, unnecessary re-renders, and security vulnerabilities. Suggest optimizations.

pro_tips: Always use a custom system prompt to force Claude to write documentation alongside code; it adds immense value for client handoffs.
Use Antigravity to generate specialized 'Client Documentation' files that explain the architecture in plain English.
If Claude gets stuck in a loop, ask it to 'List the last 3 files modified' and manually revert the most complex one before retrying.
Treat your Claude Code config files like source code—version control them to keep your workflow consistent across all client projects.
Always run 'claude audit' before every push to production; it catches security flaws that humans often miss during late-night coding sessions.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, deploy your boilerplate to Vercel and create a 2-minute 'feature showcase' video to send to your next prospective client.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading hours for dollars. Build a high-velocity freelance engine that scales with your ambition. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
